TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Mkslaq, title = Mkslaq, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mkslaq} }

S.FORM: alang Mkslaq ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 77 buwan, 242 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 216 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 26 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 84%, Amis 1%, Rukay 1%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Mkslaq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Mkslaq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Mkslaq hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mkslaq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Mkslaq hya' ga Hbun-Rangay. tay 'zil na Mkslaq hya' ga Gowryu. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Mkslaq ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 77 buwan, 242 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 216 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 26 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 84%, Amis 1%, Rukay 1%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Mkslaq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Mkslaq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Mkslaq hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mkslaq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Mkslaq hya' ga Hbun-Rangay. tay 'zil na Mkslaq hya' ga Gowryu. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mks~ɕlaq ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, rukaj *%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mks~ɕlaq ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na mks~ɕlaq ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na mks~ɕlaq ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na mks~ɕlaq ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na mks~ɕlaq ħjaʔ ɣa ħβun-raŋaj. taj ʔzil na mks~ɕlaq ħjaʔ ɣa ɣowrju. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
